config.handybookshelves.title: Handy Bookshelves Settings
config.handybookshelves.enableGlint.desc: Show an enchantment shimmer on chiseled bookshelf slots that contain enchanted books.
config.handybookshelves.enableNameTags.d: Show a floating label above bookshelf slots when you aim at them. Displays enchantment names, written book titles, and custom item names.
config.handybookshelves.nameTagRange.des: How close you need to be (in blocks) for name tags to appear.
config.handybookshelves.nameTagScale.des: Size of the name tag text. 100% is vanilla name tag size.
